recommendations.title: The Fugitive
recommendations.overview: Wrongfully convicted of murdering his wife and sentenced to death, Richard Kimble escapes from the law in an attempt to find the real killer and clear his name.

recommendations.title: Murphy's Law
recommendations.overview: A tough police detective escapes from custody after being framed and arrested for the murder of his ex-wife, and must now find the real killer and prove his innocence.

recommendations.title: Nimona
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Adventure, Fantasy, Comedy, Action, Drama, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A knight framed for a tragic crime teams with a scrappy, shape-shifting teen to prove his innocence.

recommendations.title: Papillon
recommendations.overview: Henri “Papillon” Charrière, a safecracker from the Parisian underworld, is wrongfully convicted and sentenced to life imprisonment in the penal colony of French Guiana, where he forges a strong friendship with Louis Dega, a counterfeiter who needs hi

recommendations.title: Red Corner
recommendations.overview: An American attorney on business in China, ends up wrongfully on trial for murder and his only key to innocence is a female defense lawyer from the country.

recommendations.title: Kaithi
recommendations.overview: Dilli, a convicted criminal, is out on parole to meet his daughter. However, a drug bust sets him off on a mission to save the life of police officers.

recommendations.title: Miracle in Cell No. 7
recommendations.overview: Separated from his daughter, a father with an intellectual disability must prove his innocence when he is jailed for the death of a commander's child.

recommendations.title: The Parole Officer
recommendations.overview: A hapless parole officer is framed for murder by a crooked police chief. To prove his innocence he must entice his former clients away from the law abiding lives they are now living to recover the evidence that will save him.

recommendations.title: Night Call
recommendations.overview: Mady, a student, works as a locksmith by night. He helps Claire get into her apartment and soon realizes that she lied to him about her identity and robbed something that belonged to a dangerous man, Yannick. Mady gets embroiled in a manhunt and will

recommendations.title: Dark Passage
recommendations.overview: A man convicted of murdering his wife escapes from prison and works with a woman to try and prove his innocence.
